name: Barratt Redrow PLC
description: The UK's largest housebuilder following the 2024 merger of Barratt Developments and Redrow. Operates through Barratt Homes, David Wilson Homes, Barratt London and Redrow brands.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Combined group completions recovering toward 20k+ level. ASP growth ~2.5% pa from mix shift and house price inflation. Redrow's premium positioning lifts blended ASP.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Operating margin recovery from cyclical trough as volumes normalise. Integration synergies from Redrow merger (targeted £90m pa). Legacy building safety costs declining.
assumptions.risks: Interest rate sensitivity, planning delays, land cost inflation, mortgage affordability constraints, integration execution risk, legacy cladding liabilities.
assumptions.catalyst: Volume recovery, mortgage rate stabilisation, synergy realisation, land bank optionality, dividend cover policy change to 2x from FY26.
